name: paper-css

en.when_to_use: Use it when a set of semantic HTML pages must quickly become physical-paper previews and print pages in A3/A4/A5/Letter/Legal sizes instead of hand-written millimeter CSS, which fails at paper geometry, print-width correction, and consistency between screen preview and print.
en.why_valuable: AI tends to mix px, mm, and browser margins and cannot reliably align physical paper sizes, landscape formats, and print scaling. paper-css removes these edge cases with a body paper-size class and .sheet contract.

data_in.note: boot wraps each pages_html item in a native .sheet. The paper size must be a real body class because that is the exact upstream CSS selector contract.

schema.pages_html: string[] -- each item is one trusted or sanitized HTML fragment page; an empty array displays the empty state
schema.padding_mm?: 0 | 10 | 15 | 20 | 25 -- defaults to 10; 0 adds no padding class

spec.note: The default portrait A4 .sheet is 210mm x 296mm, about 1119px high at 96dpi. The host preview reserves at least that explicit pixel height and scrolls; do not use vh or percentage heights. Other paper sizes follow the CSS millimeter geometry.

when_to_use: 需要把一组语义 HTML 快速摆成 A3/A4/A5/Letter/Legal 的实体纸张预览与打印页时用它而非手写毫米尺寸 CSS,因为原生手写在纸张几何、打印宽度修正和屏幕预览一致性上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认会混用 px、mm 与浏览器页边距,无法稳定对齐实体纸张尺寸、横向纸型和打印缩放;paper-css 用 body 纸型类与 .sheet 契约消除这些边角差异。

data_in._why_no_example: 语义 HTML 是 AI 原生记法;纸型、方向和 padding 的枚举已钉死,无需 minimal example。
data_in.note: boot 把 pages_html 每项包成一个原生 .sheet;纸型必须落在真实 body class,这是上游 CSS 的精确选择器契约。

schema.pages_html: string[] —— 每项是一页可信或已清洗的 HTML fragment;空数组显示空态
schema.padding_mm?: 0 | 10 | 15 | 20 | 25 —— 默认 10;0 表示不加 padding class

spec.note: 默认 A4 纵向 .sheet 是 210mm×296mm,按 96dpi 约 1119px 高;宿主预览至少保留这一明确像素高度并滚动,禁止 vh/百分比高。其他纸型以 CSS 的 mm 几何为准。

boot.widget: unsupported:上游纸张几何写成 body.A4 .sheet 等选择器,@page 与 print 宽度也绑定真实 document;把 CSS 放进 shadow 后无法保持原生契约

carriers.widget: unsupported:body/@page 选择器无法收束到 shadow 且仍保持毫米级打印语义
carriers.codex: supported:独占 sandbox iframe 可设置真实 body class、head CSS 与浏览器打印

isolation.evidence: By design: boot itself does document.head.append(link) to load paper.css, and the CSS keys off `body.A4 .sheet` plus `@page` rules (paper.css L1,L12-21) that only resolve against the real document/body. Boot also mutates document.body.className. mm/@page print geometry cannot be re-scoped into a shadowRoot — catalog widget=unsupported is correct.
